name: katsuki bakugo
description:
love at both sides of war. (fantasy au)

you and katsuki were trained to kill each other as you both come from rival tribes, but it's easier said than done.

" amidst this poor tranquility, cause war-torn minds is all we'll ever be."

art of war - avenoir

(been wanting to write some fantasy since forever. this is my first time, and i really enjoyed it! but music mania is ending just when my writers block is gone </3)
creator: sageA
